description: Cloudflare Redirect Rules for BUYER ASISTANS multi-domain intent

target_url.expression: concat("https://buyerasistans.com.tr", http.request.uri.path, if(len(http.request.uri.query) gt 0, concat("?", http.request.uri.query), ""))
concat("https://buyerasistans.info", http.request.uri.path, if(len(http.request.uri.query) gt 0, concat("?", http.request.uri.query), ""))
concat("https://buyerasistans.online", http.request.uri.path, if(len(http.request.uri.query) gt 0, concat("?", http.request.uri.query), ""))
